texto: As the incidence and fear of rape on college campuses have increased, the term rape has been generalized to mean 'misuse; diminish the effects of; steal; defeat': "I just went to the mall and raped my VISA." "My dad phoned this morning and raped my buzz." "She raped my coat." "Michigan got raped by Carolina in the NCAA final." The extension of the term rape to such contexts ameliorates the word and appears a denial on the part of college students of the seriousness of the crime.
explicacao: Citação de Connie C. Eble sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “As the incidence and fear of rape on college campuses have increased, the term rape has been gene…” articula coragem, denial, minimization em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e minimization.
